ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the market data */,
  "mkt_rf" TEXT /* Market risk-free rate */,
  "smb" TEXT /* Small minus big market capitalization factor */,
  "hml" TEXT /* High minus low book-to-market ratio factor */,
  "rf" TEXT /* Risk-free rate */,
  "ups" TEXT /* United Parcel Service stock performance */,
  "ko" TEXT /* Coca-Cola stock performance */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_free_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rate */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Risk-free rate value */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the market factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market factor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the market factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Inception date of the portfolio */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the portfolio manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the portfolio manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the portfolio invested in the stock */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was removed from the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted stock value */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning algorithm */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning algorithm */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the algorithm during the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walkforwards" (
  "walkforward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each walk-forward optimization */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning algorithm */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the walk-forward optimization */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the walk-forward optimization */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the algorithm during the walk-forward optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("walkforward_id")
)
